cases.name: json_object_agg_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT json_object_agg(key, value) AS result FROM (SELECT 'name' as key, 'John' as value UNION SELECT 'age', '30' UNION SELECT 'city', 'NYC') AS t

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_object_agg(key, value) AS result FROM (SELECT 'name' as key, 'Alice' as value UNION SELECT 'active', 'true' UNION SELECT 'score', '95.5') AS t

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-3
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_users (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            name TEXT,
            department TEXT,
            salary INTEGER
        )

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-4
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_users (name, department, salary) VALUES 
        ('John', 'Engineering', 85000),
        ('Alice', 'Marketing', 72000),
        ('Bob', 'Engineering', 90000)

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT json_object_agg(name, salary) AS result FROM test_users WHERE department = 'Engineering'

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT json_object_agg(key, value) AS result FROM (SELECT 'key' as key, 'value' as value WHERE 1=0) AS t

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT json_object_agg(key, value) AS result FROM (SELECT 'str' as key, 'hello' as value UNION SELECT 'num', '42' UNION SELECT 'bool', 'true' UNION SELECT 'null_val', NULL) AS t

cases.name: json_object_agg_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT json_object_agg(key, value) AS result FROM (SELECT 'name' as key, 'John' as value UNION SELECT 'age', '30' UNION SELECT 'name', 'Jane') AS t

cases.name: json_each_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each('{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "active": true}') AS t ORDER BY key

cases.name: json_each_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM jsonb_each('{"x": 1, "y": 2}') AS t ORDER BY key

cases.name: json_each_test-3
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_json (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data TEXT
        )

cases.name: json_each_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT test_json.id, t.key, t.value FROM test_json, json_each(data) AS t WHERE test_json.id = 1 ORDER BY t.key

cases.name: json_each_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each('{}') AS t

cases.name: json_each_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each('[]') AS t

cases.name: json_each_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each('["apple", "banana", "cherry"]') AS t ORDER BY key

cases.name: json_each_test-8
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_json (id, data) VALUES 
        (1, '{"name": "Alice", "age": 25}'),
        (2, '{"name": "Bob", "score": 95}')

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_delete('{"name": "John", "age": 30, "email": "john@example.com"}', '{email}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_delete('{"user": {"name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"}, "active": true}', '{user,email}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_delete('["apple", "banana", "cherry", "date"]', '{1}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_delete_path('{"name": "John", "age": 30, "email": "john@example.com"}', '{age}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_delete('{"name": "John", "age": 30}', '{email}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-6
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_jsonb_delete (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data TEXT
        )

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT id, jsonb_delete(data, '{email}') AS updated_data FROM test_jsonb_delete WHERE id = 1

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT id, jsonb_delete(data, '{skills,1}') AS updated_data FROM test_jsonb_delete WHERE id = 2

cases.name: jsonb_delete_test-9
json_operator_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_json_ops (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data JSON,
            config JSONB
        )

cases.name: json_operator_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT data->>'name' AS name FROM test_json_ops WHERE id = 1

cases.name: json_operator_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT data->'items' AS items FROM test_json_ops WHERE id = 2

cases.name: json_operator_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT data->'nested'->'level1'->>'level2' AS value FROM test_json_ops WHERE id = 3

cases.name: json_operator_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT data#>>'{nested,level1,level2}' AS value FROM test_json_ops WHERE id = 3

cases.name: json_operator_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_json_ops WHERE data @> '{"name": "Alice"}'

cases.name: json_operator_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_json_ops WHERE '{"name": "Bob"}' <@ data

cases.name: json_operator_test-8
cases.sql:
SELECT 
            id,
            data->>'name' AS name,
            config->>'role' AS role
        FROM test_json_ops 
        WHERE data @> '{"active": true}' 
           OR config->>'role' = 'user'

cases.name: json_operator_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT json_array_length('[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]') AS len

cases.name: json_operator_test-10
cases.sql: SELECT json_typeof('{"key": "value"}') AS type

cases.name: json_operator_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_object_keys('{"a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3}') AS keys

cases.name: json_operator_test-12
cases.sql: SELECT json_strip_nulls('{"a": 1, "b": null, "c": 3}') AS stripped

cases.name: json_operator_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_set('{"a": 1, "b": 2}', '{b}', '99') AS updated

cases.name: json_operator_test-14
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract_path('{"a": {"b": {"c": 42}}}', 'a.b.c') AS value

cases.name: json_operator_test-15
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract_path_text('{"name": "John", "age": 30}', 'name') AS name

cases.name: json_operator_test-16
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_json_ops (id, data, config) VALUES 
        (1, '{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "active": true}', '{"role": "admin", "perms": ["read", "write"]}'),
        (2, '{"name": "Bob", "items": [1, 2, 3]}', '{"role": "user"}'),
        (3, '{"nested": {"level1": {"level2": 42}}}', '{"complex": true}')

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_jsonb_pretty (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data TEXT
        )

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT id, jsonb_pretty(data) AS pretty_data FROM test_jsonb_pretty WHERE id = 1

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT id, jsonb_pretty(data) AS pretty_data FROM test_jsonb_pretty WHERE id = 2

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('{}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('[]') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('42') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('null') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('{not valid json}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('{"name":"John","age":30,"active":true}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-10
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('{"user":{"name":"Alice","contacts":{"email":"alice@example.com","phone":"555-1234"}},"tags":["vip","premium"]}') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('[{"id":1,"name":"Item 1"},{"id":2,"name":"Item 2"},{"id":3,"name":"Item 3"}]') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-12
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_jsonb_pretty (id, data) VALUES 
        (1, '{"product":{"name":"Widget","price":19.99,"specs":{"weight":"100g","dimensions":[10,5,2]}},"inStock":true}'),
        (2, '["compact","array","without","formatting"]')

cases.name: jsonb_pretty_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_pretty('"hello world"') AS result

cases.name: json_agg_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE employees (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            name TEXT,
            department TEXT,
            salary INTEGER
        )

cases.name: json_agg_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT json_agg(name) AS names FROM employees

cases.name: json_agg_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT json_agg(salary) AS salaries FROM employees WHERE department = 'Engineering'

cases.name: json_agg_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_agg(name) AS names FROM employees WHERE department = 'Sales'

cases.name: json_agg_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT json_agg(name) AS names FROM employees WHERE department = 'NonExistent'

cases.name: json_agg_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT department, json_agg(name) AS names FROM employees GROUP BY department ORDER BY department

cases.name: json_agg_test-7
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_nulls (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            value TEXT
        )

cases.name: json_agg_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT json_agg(value) AS value_list FROM test_nulls ORDER BY id

cases.name: json_agg_test-9
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department, salary) VALUES 
        (1, 'Alice', 'Engineering', 95000),
        (2, 'Bob', 'Engineering', 87000),
        (3, 'Charlie', 'Sales', 75000),
        (4, 'Diana', 'Sales', 82000),
        (5, 'Eve', 'Marketing', 70000)

cases.name: json_agg_test-10
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_nulls (id, value) VALUES 
        (1, 'A'),
        (2, NULL),
        (3, 'B'),
        (4, NULL)

cases.name: json_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_json (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            config JSON,
            settings JSONB,
            metadata TEXT
        )

cases.name: json_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT id, config, settings FROM test_json WHERE id = 1

cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_json (id, config, settings, metadata) VALUES 
        (1, '{"name": "test", "value": 42}', '{"enabled": true, "options": ["a", "b"]}', 'plain text')

cases.name: json_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT json_valid('{"valid": true}') as is_valid

cases.name: json_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT json_valid('{invalid json}') as is_valid

cases.name: json_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT json_typeof('{"key": "value"}') as type

cases.name: json_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT json_array_length('[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]') as length

cases.name: json_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_object_keys('{"name": "John", "age": 30, "city": "NYC"}') as keys

cases.name: json_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT to_json('hello world') as json_str

cases.name: json_test-10
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract_scalar('{"name": "Alice", "age": 25}', 'name') as name

cases.name: json_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_contains('{"a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3}', '{"a": 1, "b": 2}') as contains

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_insert('{"name": "John", "age": 30}', '{email}', '"john@example.com"') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_insert('{"user": {"name": "Alice"}, "active": true}', '{user,email}', '"alice@example.com"') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_insert('["apple", "banana", "cherry"]', '{1}', '"orange"') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_insert('["apple", "banana", "cherry"]', '{1}', '"orange"', true) AS result

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT jsonb_insert('{"name": "John", "age": 30}', '{name}', '"Jane"') AS result

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-6
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_jsonb_insert (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data TEXT
        )

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT id, jsonb_insert(data, '{email}', '"user@example.com"') AS updated_data FROM test_jsonb_insert WHERE id = 1

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT id, jsonb_insert(data, '{skills,1}', '"debugging"') AS updated_data FROM test_jsonb_insert WHERE id = 2

cases.name: jsonb_insert_test-9
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_jsonb_insert (id, data) VALUES 
        (1, '{"name": "Alice", "age": 25}'),
        (2, '{"name": "Bob", "skills": ["coding", "testing"]}')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_existence (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data JSONB
        )

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_key(data, 'name') ORDER BY id

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_key(data, 'missing_key')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_any_key(data, 'email,age,department') ORDER BY id

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_any_key(data, 'missing1,missing2,missing3')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_all_keys(data, 'name,age')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_all_keys(data, 'name,email')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM test_existence WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_key(data, 'name') AND pgsqlite_json_has_any_key(data, 'role,department') ORDER BY id

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-9
cases.sql: INSERT INTO test_existence (id, data) VALUES (5, '[1, 2, 3]')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-11
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE users (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            profile JSONB
        )

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-12
cases.sql: SELECT u.id FROM users u WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_key(u.profile, 'email') ORDER BY u.id

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT u.id FROM users u WHERE pgsqlite_json_has_any_key(u.profile, 'email,phone') ORDER BY u.id

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-14
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_existence (id, data) VALUES 
        (1, '{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "active": true}'),
        (2, '{"name": "Bob", "email": "bob@example.com", "role": "admin"}'),
        (3, '{"title": "Manager", "department": "IT", "clearance": "high"}'),
        (4, '{"items": ["laptop", "mouse"], "budget": 1000}')

cases.name: json_existence_operators_test-15
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO users (id, profile) VALUES 
        (1, '{"name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"}'),
        (2, '{"username": "bob123", "phone": "555-1234"}')

cases.name: json_each_text_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_data (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            data JSONB
        )

cases.name: json_each_text_test-2
cases.sql:
SELECT td.id, e.key, json_each_text_value(td.data, e.key) AS value 
         FROM test_data td,
              json_each_text(td.data) AS e
         WHERE e.key = 'inStock'
         ORDER BY td.id

cases.name: json_each_text_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each_text('{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "active": true, "score": null}') AS t ORDER BY key

cases.name: json_each_text_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM jsonb_each_text('{"items": [1, 2, 3], "meta": {"version": 1.0}}') AS t ORDER BY key

cases.name: json_each_text_test-5
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_data (id, data) VALUES 
        (1, '{"quantity": 10, "price": 29.99, "inStock": true}'),
        (2, '{"quantity": 0, "price": 15.50, "inStock": false}')

cases.name: json_each_text_test-6
cases.sql:
SELECT key, value 
           FROM json_each_text('{"a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3, "d": 4, "e": 5}') AS t
           WHERE CAST(value AS INTEGER) > 2
           ORDER BY key

cases.name: json_each_text_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each_text('{}') AS t

cases.name: json_each_text_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT key, value FROM json_each_text('[]') AS t
